Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril shares the accessible and sustainable virtues of southern caviar.
Video.title: Sustainable Luxury: Southern Caviar

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.
Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: Emeril prepares a Tex-Mex menu to dazzle Houston Texan superfans.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for a grilled menu.
Video.title: Grill It Up!
